name: Cult Archivist
visual_description: A pale, robed human cleric kneels reverently before an ornate stone tablet inscribed with geometric patterns, hands extended in devotion. Soft golden light radiates from the artifact, illuminating her weathered face and worn white vestments. Dust motes drift through the reverent stillness.
full_prompt: A pale, robed human cleric kneels reverently before an ornate stone tablet inscribed with geometric patterns, hands extended in devotion. Soft golden light radiates from the artifact, illuminating her weathered face and worn white vestments. Dust motes drift through the reverent stillness.. Stylized digital illustration, structured balanced composition, warm sandstone and ivory tones, golden-hour lighting with long shadows, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
